name: pr-lifecycle
description: W4 — Path-History Reviewer Routing + idempotent PR state machine. Opens draft PRs with session-context descriptions (upgrades to Hornet V4 when available), ranks reviewers via git-blame + CODEOWNERS + optional availability events, drives merge-queue integration. GitHub fully implemented via gh CLI; 9 other hosts stub cleanly and degrade to manual-handoff mode.
